title: Auto Use XP Bottles
description: This mod removes the need to throw XP bottles. The bottles are automatically used in your inventory.
body:
# Auto Use XP Bottles

**Auto Use XP Bottles** is a client & server-side mod that removes the need to manually throw XP bottles. Bottles are automatically converted into experience the moment they enter your inventory.

> 🐛 Please visit my [GitHub page](https://github.com/Tobber56/Floonks-Mods) to see my other mods and for sending bug reports, suggestions, and questions.
>
> 🔌 **Compatibility** — Auto Use XP Bottles is compatible with **LevelZ**

---

## Features

### ⚡ Automatic conversion
XP bottles are instantly converted to experience points when picked up or moved into your inventory.

### 🔁 Toggleable
Toggle the auto-conversion feature on or off with a keybind (default: **X**, configurable in the controls menu).

### 🛠 Fully configurable
Add custom XP items from other mods through the config file so they’re also handled automatically.

### 🎯 Vanilla-accurate XP
Each bottle gives random XP between 3–11, matching vanilla Minecraft’s behavior.

### 🔇 Silent operation
No bottle-breaking sounds—just seamless XP gain directly into your bar.

---

## Notes

- Works on both **client and server**  
- Supports **Fabric** and **Forge**
